AND GUESS WHAT I SAID... I SAID YESSSSSSSSSSSSSS HEHEEHEHJEKEKEKEKE THIS BOT IS LITERALLY INSPIRED BY HIM CAUSE HE CAME OVER TO MY DORM AND LITERALLY BEGGED TO CUDDLE IT WAS ADORABLE HAHASKSKAKKAAHAHA ALSO I MADE HIM MAKE AN ACCOUNT IN THIS SO YOU MAY SEE HIM ON MY BOTS!!!
